goalTitle: setLicenseKey global API + key 알고리즘 결정 ADR

F-01.evidence: Glob verified: types.ts, state.ts, verifySignature.ts, setLicenseKey.ts (NEW 4) at topvel-grid-monorepo/packages/grid-license/src/; index.ts (MODIFY 1) same dir; MOD-GRID-99-A-decisions.md (NEW 1) at .claude/tw-grid/decisions/. All 6 files present.

F-02.evidence: Spec Section 7 Truth Table 6 files: NEW 5 + MODIFY 1 — all implemented exactly. goals.json implementFiles had incorrect prefix (D1 정정): spec authoritative per C-27. goalsJsonImplementFiles: 'goals.json prefix error TOMIS/packages/ vs spec topvel-grid-monorepo/packages/ — spec applied (D1)'.

F-03.evidence: (외부 디렉토리 — git 추적 불가, Glob 5개 src 파일 + 1개 decisions 파일 확인으로 대체) topvel-grid-monorepo는 TOMIS git 외부. ADR-MOD-GRID-00-001 근거. dist/ 산출물 6개 파일 추가 확인: index.cjs, index.mjs, index.d.ts, index.d.cts + map files.

F-04.evidence: Grep 'setLicenseKey' → setLicenseKey.ts L15 (export def) + index.ts L2 (re-export). Grep 'LicenseStatus' → types.ts L3, setLicenseKey.ts L1+L17, state.ts L1+L9, verifySignature.ts L1+L27. Grep 'verifySignature' → setLicenseKey.ts L3+L20. All core identifiers found.

F-05.evidence: Spec is authority. Prompt referenced spec Section 4 prose return type (Promise<LicenseState>) vs Section 5.3 executable (Promise<LicenseStatus>). Implemented Promise<LicenseStatus> per C-30 Truth Table Discipline (Section 5.3 executable authoritative). Drift reported in specCodeDefects[0].

F-06.evidence: specCodeDefects[] 2건 recorded. (1) Section 4 prose vs Section 5.3 executable return type mismatch — Section 5.3 authoritative per C-30. (2) spec verifySignature.ts import includes unused LicenseState — removed to pass noUnusedLocals. Both documented in specCodeDefects.

specCodeDefects.defect: Section 4 prose states verifySignature return type as Promise<LicenseState>, but Section 5.3 executable (L306) specifies Promise<LicenseStatus> — internal spec inconsistency
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: Implemented Promise<LicenseStatus> per Section 5.3 executable — authoritative per C-30 Truth Table Discipline

specCodeDefects.specLocation: G-001-spec.md L280 Section 5.3 verifySignature.ts import line
specCodeDefects.defect: Spec import line 'import type { LicenseState, LicenseStatus } from './types.js'' includes LicenseState which is never used in verifySignature.ts — causes noUnusedLocals error (tsconfig.base.json strict)
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: Removed unused LicenseState from import: 'import type { LicenseStatus } from ./types.js' — LicenseState is only needed in state.ts

A-01.evidence: All 5 NEW files exist at exact spec Section 7 paths. MODIFY index.ts confirmed at topvel-grid-monorepo/packages/grid-license/src/index.ts. ADR decisions.md at .claude/tw-grid/decisions/MOD-GRID-99-A-decisions.md.

A-02.evidence: setLicenseKey(key: string): LicenseStatus matches spec AC-001. LicenseStatus {valid:boolean, reason?:LicenseReason, expiresAt?:Date, domain?:string} matches spec types.ts. LicenseReason = 'invalid'|'expired'|'domain-mismatch' matches spec. getLicenseState():LicenseStatus internal (not exported from index.ts per D4). index.ts exports: setLicenseKey, LicenseStatus, LicenseReason only.

A-03.evidence: tsc --noEmit 0 errors. Usage pattern: setLicenseKey('key') returns LicenseStatus immediately. verifySignature async internal — compiles cleanly with Web Crypto SubtleCrypto types from lib.dom.

A-04.evidence: 신규 패키지 기능. No variant mapping table in spec Section 3 (section does not exist — no AS-IS counterpart).

A-05.evidence: AC-001 setLicenseKey(key): LicenseStatus ✓. AC-002 verifySignature Ed25519 Web Crypto ✓. AC-003 setLicenseKey 미호출 → getLicenseState() {valid:false,reason:'invalid'} ✓. AC-004 외부 npm 0개 ✓ (Web Crypto builtin). AC-005 localhost/127.0.0.1 dev 자동 허용 ✓ (verifySignature.ts L80). AC-006 SSR window undefined → domain skip ✓ (verifySignature.ts L72-74). AC-007 ADR 3건: algorithm, domain-verify, sync-API ✓.

A-06.evidence: setLicenseKey IS the public API export — no standalone util requiring external wiring. verifySignature is called internally by setLicenseKey. No separate util file that needs to be imported from a parent file.

A-07.evidence: spec Section 7 Truth Table에 *.test.ts 또는 *.spec.ts 파일 없음. Section 12 'vitest 설정 deferred' 명시 — 테스트 파일 이번 Goal 범위 외.

B-02.evidence: Grep ': any|<any>|as any' on packages/grid-license/src/ — 0 results. Type assertions used: '{ reason: 'invalid' } as { reason: 'invalid' }' pattern (C-29 spread-skip, type-narrowed assertion per spec — not 'as any').

B-03.evidence: grid-license 패키지는 TanStack Table을 사용하지 않는 순수 라이선스 검증 라이브러리.

B-04.evidence: CSS/Tailwind 없음. 순수 TypeScript utility 패키지.

B-05.evidence: grid-license 패키지에 eslint 설정 없음. 순수 TypeScript — tsc strict (noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters) 통과로 대체 검증.

B-07.evidence: 테스트 파일 없음 (Goal 범위 외). 프로덕션 코드에 mock/dummy 데이터 0건.

C-04.evidence: grid-license에 React/TanStack 의존성 없음. peerDependencies 불필요 (순수 Web Crypto API + TypeScript).

D-01.evidence: 사용처 0개 (신규 기능). G-002/G-003에서 grid-pro-* 패키지가 grid-license를 import 예정.

E-01.evidence: .size-limit.json에 grid-license entry 없음 — 이번 Goal implementFiles에 미포함. raw dist: index.mjs 2.7KB, index.cjs 2.7KB (Pro 20KB 한도 대비 충분히 작음). E-01 N/A sub-condition: Goal spec.implementFiles에 .size-limit.json 미포함 + raw size 한도 내.
